rules.summary: Runtime resource rows must launch saved or inferred web-interface URLs through the shared name-link template, not a page-local link or separate web column.
Platform, workload, and infrastructure inline detail rows must compose the shared row/cell/content shell instead of recreating page-local surface-alt drawer rows.

Toast notification status icons and dismiss actions must compose library icons and ActionIconButton so every page inherits shared notification chrome instead of raw SVG glyphs or local close-button classes.

patterns: flex-shrink-0 text-muted hover:text-base-content hover:bg-surface rounded-md p-1.5 transition-all duration-200

rules.summary: Inline platform detail content must compose DetailSectionTable or InlineDetailPanel for shared detail rows, value tones, section tables, and close actions instead of recreating local field grids or provider-named detail primitives.

Resource detail drawer models must use the shared detail-section numeric formatting helpers for byte scaling, integer labels, and count pluralization instead of recreating provider-local byte/count helpers.
Product table surfaces must compose TableCard for the shared card frame instead of recreating local overflow-hidden bordered table wrappers.
Table-card headers must compose TableCardHeader for title/action/clear chrome instead of recreating local summary-table header aliases.
Compact drawer, discovery, resource-detail, and shared overview cards must compose InfoCardFrame for the common bordered surface frame instead of recreating local card-shell classes.
Settings informational, warning, success, and danger callouts must compose CalloutCard for shared tone, density, icon, and copy layout instead of recreating local colored panel shells.
Shared error-boundary fallback notices must compose CalloutCard and library icons for tone, spacing, and dark-mode styling instead of recreating local red panels or inline SVG alert glyphs.

Update confirmation and progress modals must compose CalloutCard, Button, ActionIconButton, LoadingSpinner, and library icons for shared status, warning, restart, and command chrome instead of recreating local colored panels, raw SVG glyphs, or modal-local button classes.

mt-2 px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium text-white bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 rounded

rules.summary: Platform inline notices must compose InlineNotice for shared dense notice tone, icon/content layout, and action-link chrome instead of copying platform-local amber notice shells.
Dismissible global demo-mode notices must compose InlineNotice banner layout and shared dismiss chrome instead of copying local blue notice shells, raw SVG icons, or page-local close buttons.

Global commercial migration notices must compose InlineNotice banner layout, library icons, shared action slots, and shared dismiss chrome instead of copying local paid-state tone shells, raw SVGs, or page-local buttons.
The GitHub star prompt must compose Button and ActionIconButton for its primary, defer, and dismiss actions instead of carrying local floating-prompt button shells.

rules.summary: SSO provider settings actions must compose the shared Button, ActionIconButton, and CopyValueButton primitives instead of restoring panel-local action buttons.

rules.summary: Resource and health indicator dots must compose StatusDot for shared size, variant, pulse, title, and aria behavior instead of recreating local rounded status spans.

Shared primitives, Login, Settings, Patrol, AI, and shared loading indicators must compose LoadingSpinner for shared size, tone, and accessibility behavior instead of recreating border-based animate-spin spans.

rules.summary: Settings loading skeletons must compose SettingsLoadingSkeleton for shared pulse animation, skeleton color, metric-grid, progress-card, and table-row shells instead of recreating page-local skeleton blocks.

Standard command buttons and button-styled route actions must compose Button or ButtonLink for shared variants, sizes, focus, disabled, loading, and safe-link behavior instead of recreating local Tailwind button shells.

rules.summary: Button-styled upgrade CTAs must compose UpgradeButtonLink so destination routing, new-tab safety, opener preservation, tone, width, and shared button styling stay canonical.

rules.summary: Inline external documentation links in settings must compose ExternalTextLink for shared new-tab safety, text-link tone, compact action variants, and focus styling instead of hand-coding anchor rel/target and Tailwind link shells.
Copyable code/value rows must compose CopyableCodeRow for the shared code surface and copy action instead of recreating local font-mono row shells.

patterns: flex items-start gap-2 rounded bg-surface-alt px-2 py-1.5

rules.summary: Native select controls must compose FormSelect for shared label/id/help wiring, value synchronization, and select chrome instead of recreating labelled select wrappers locally.
Native textarea controls must compose FormTextarea for shared label/id/help wiring, value synchronization, and textarea chrome instead of recreating labelled textarea wrappers locally.

Binary on/off controls must compose Toggle or TogglePrimitive for shared track/knob styling, disabled behavior, label/description wiring, and synthetic checked events instead of recreating local switch buttons.

Read-only health/state badges must compose StatusIndicatorBadge for shared status-to-tone mapping, sizing, dot wiring, and label presentation instead of recreating local badge spans with getStatusIndicatorBadgeToneClasses.
Platform alert tables must compose AlertSeverityBadge and AlertSeverityDot for shared severity labels, tone mapping, and status-indicator rendering instead of recreating severity helpers locally.

Platform alert tables must get All/Critical/Warning/Info severity filter labels, tones, and leading dots from the shared platform alert severity filter-options primitive instead of recreating local option arrays.
Platform alert detail rows must get severity-to-detail-row tone mapping from alertSeverityPresentation instead of defining table-local alertTone helpers.
Platform alert tables must get provider code, resource-type, entity-type, and timestamp labels from alertDetailPresentation instead of defining table-local detail formatter helpers.
Read-only metadata chips must compose MetadataBadge so size, shape, tone vocabulary, fit behavior, and whitespace handling stay shared instead of being copied as page-local pill spans.

rules.summary: Organization role badges must compose OrganizationRoleBadge instead of each organization settings section mapping role tones and pill styling locally.
Organization share status badges must compose OrganizationShareStatusBadge so pending/active labels and tones stay canonical across incoming and outgoing share tables.
Platform page and table loading states must compose PlatformTableLoadingState instead of recreating local TableCard status rows.
Platform tables must use the shared text-cell fallback helper for trimmed strings and canonical empty-cell markers instead of recreating local textValue helpers.
Platform tables must use the shared title-case fallback helper for status/state labels instead of recreating local titleCase helpers.
Platform tables must use the shared compact value summary helper for trimmed list labels and full title text instead of recreating local compactList or summarizeValues helpers.
Platform tables must use the shared one-unit uptime fallback helper instead of recreating local formatUptime helpers.
Platform tables must use the shared byte-size fallback helper for positive byte formatting and canonical empty-cell markers instead of recreating local formatBytes wrappers.

Platform tables must use the shared compact date-time value primitive for timestamp cells, tabular styling, and canonical empty-cell markers instead of recreating local compact toLocaleString helpers.

Platform tables must use the shared relative-time value primitive for dense timestamp-age cells, tabular styling, compact labels, and canonical empty-cell markers instead of calling formatRelativeTime directly.

Platform tables must use the shared duration value primitive for elapsed duration and polling interval cells, tabular styling, fallback labels, and canonical empty-cell markers instead of declaring local seconds/minutes helpers.
Responsive platform table models must use the shared weighted column-width helper for visible-column percentage normalization instead of declaring local percentage-format helpers.
Platform tables and drawers must use the shared integer formatter with PlatformTableNumberValue for locale-formatted count cells instead of recreating local toLocaleString or Math.round helpers.

Platform tables must use the shared number-value fallback primitive for finite numeric table cells, tabular styling, and canonical empty-cell markers instead of recreating local numberValue/countCell helpers.
Platform tables must use the shared count-ratio primitive for healthy/total or ready/total count cells instead of recreating local numerator/slash/denominator markup.
Platform tables must use the shared count-ratio formatter for ready/total string labels instead of recreating local ready/total template literals.

Platform tables and drawers must use the shared percent-value primitive/helper for one-decimal percent cells, overlay labels, tabular styling, ratio normalization, clamping, and canonical empty-cell markers instead of recreating local formatPercent helpers.
Platform tables must use the shared temperature-value primitive for positive Celsius cells, tabular styling, and canonical empty-cell markers instead of recreating local formatTemperature helpers.
Platform tables must use shared metric fallback and finite-metric helpers instead of recreating local centered dash fallbacks and Number.isFinite wrappers.
Platform table models must use the shared finite-metric normalization helper instead of carrying model-local Number.isFinite wrappers.
Platform page and table load failures must compose PlatformErrorState instead of recreating a local EmptyState plus Refresh action.
Platform page workflow tabs must compose PlatformSectionTabs instead of recreating page-local nav tab bars.
Resource-list filter surfaces must compose the shared FilterBar catalog shell instead of recreating page-local filter rows or legacy PageControls decks.
Product surfaces with simple search fields must compose SearchField for the shared icon, clear button, keyboard, focus, aria, and input chrome instead of rendering native search inputs.
Resource-list and drawer search boxes that need history, tips, or type-to-search behavior must compose SearchInput instead of rebuilding search-enhancement controls locally.
Settings and compact feature segmented selectors must compose FilterButtonGroup instead of recreating active-button group styling locally.

inline-flex min-h-8 items-center gap-1.5 rounded-sm px-3 text-xs font-medium transition-colors

rules.summary: Pressed/unpressed rounded pill selectors must compose SelectablePillButton so active tone, disabled treatment, focus ring, and aria-pressed semantics stay shared instead of being recreated inside settings surfaces.

min-h-10 sm:min-h-10 rounded-full border px-3 py-2 text-sm font-semibold transition

rules.summary: Summary-bearing filter surfaces must compose ChartVisibilityToggleButton for chart show/hide display actions instead of recreating one-off chart toggle buttons.
Table column visibility controls must compose ColumnPicker instead of recreating column chooser trigger, panel, reset, or hidden-count chrome locally.
Selectable settings card groups must compose SelectionCardGroup instead of recreating compact/detail active-card styling and disabled selection behavior locally.
Grouped/list table-mode controls must compose GroupedTableModeSegmentedControl instead of recreating grouped/list labels, titles, or icons locally.

patternGuards.summary: Alert resource threshold action controls must not recreate icon-only buttons with inline SVGs locally; compose ActionIconButton and lucide icons for row, mobile, and global actions.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Alert resource threshold action buttons compose ActionIconButton for shared size, tone, focus, and accessible label behavior.

patternGuards.summary: Standalone machine row action triggers must not recreate local muted h-7 icon-button shells; compose ActionIconButton.

patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Standalone machine action triggers compose ActionIconButton for shared icon-action size, tone, focus, title, and accessible-label behavior.

patternGuards.summary: AI Chat queued message edit/remove actions must not recreate local 20px blue icon-button shells; compose ActionIconButton.
allPatterns: inline-flex h-5 w-5 items-center justify-center rounded text-blue-700 transition-colors hover:bg-blue-100 hover:text-blue-950 focus:bg-blue-100 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/30
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. AI Chat queued message icon actions belong to ActionIconButton.

patternGuards.summary: AI Chat header icon actions must not recreate local h-8 bordered icon-button shells; compose ActionIconButton.

patternGuards.summary: AI Chat queued follow-up and session accent icon actions must not recreate local blue h-6/h-7 icon-button shells; compose ActionIconButton.
allPatterns: inline-flex h-6 w-6 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-md text-blue-700 transition-colors hover:bg-blue-100 hover:text-blue-950
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. AI Chat accent icon actions belong to ActionIconButton.

patternGuards.summary: AI Chat composer send action must not recreate the local primary icon-button shell; compose ActionIconButton.
allPatterns: flex h-9 w-9 items-center justify-center rounded-md bg-blue-600 text-white shadow-sm transition-colors hover:bg-blue-700
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. AI Chat primary icon actions belong to ActionIconButton.

patternGuards.summary: AI Chat transcript fallback warning icon actions must not recreate local amber icon-button shells; compose ActionIconButton.
allPatterns: flex h-7 w-7 items-center justify-center rounded-md border border-amber-200 bg-surface text-amber-700 transition-colors hover:bg-amber-100
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. AI Chat warning icon actions belong to ActionIconButton.

patternGuards.summary: AI Chat composer footer icon actions must not recreate local bordered h-7 icon-button shells; compose ActionIconButton.
allPatterns: flex h-7 w-7 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-md border border-border bg-surface text-muted transition-colors hover:border-border hover:bg-surface-hover hover:text-base-content
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. AI Chat footer icon actions belong to ActionIconButton.

patternGuards.summary: AI Chat user and assistant message copy controls must not recreate local copied-state icon shells; compose CopyValueButton.
allPatterns: border border-border-subtle bg-surface text-muted opacity-0 shadow-sm transition-opacity hover:text-base-content
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. AI Chat message copy actions belong to CopyValueButton.

patternGuards.summary: AI Chat tool command and detail copy controls must not recreate local copied-state icon shells; compose CopyValueButton.
allPatterns: inline-flex h-6 w-6 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded border border-border-subtle bg-surface text-muted transition-colors hover:bg-surface-hover hover:text-base-content focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/30
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. AI Chat tool copy actions belong to CopyValueButton.

patternGuards.summary: Connection editor settings code must not recreate amber warning callout shells locally; compose CalloutCard compact notices so tone, spacing, and dark-mode styling stay shared.
Connection editor settings code must not recreate red or rose danger callout shells locally; compose CalloutCard compact notices so alert tone, spacing, and dark-mode styling stay shared.
Connection editor settings code must not recreate red danger callout shells locally; compose CalloutCard compact notices so alert tone, spacing, and dark-mode styling stay shared.
Settings components must not recreate local pulse skeleton blocks with surface-hover fills; compose SettingsLoadingSkeleton so loading placeholders stay canonical.
Platform page code must not recreate the dense amber inline notice shell locally; compose InlineNotice so notice tone, spacing, icon layout, and action-link chrome stay shared.
Settings surfaces must not hand-code raw new-tab anchors for external documentation links; compose ExternalTextLink for inline/text links or ButtonLink for button-styled actions.
Patrol and AI finding surfaces must not recreate border-based loading spinners locally; compose LoadingSpinner so size, tone, and accessibility behavior stay shared.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Patrol action-pending, investigation-loading, header-saving, and AI finding-loading spinners compose LoadingSpinner for shared shell, sizing, tone, and accessible status behavior.

patternGuards.summary: Settings surfaces must not recreate border-top-transparent loading spinners locally; compose LoadingSpinner so size, tone, and accessibility behavior stay shared.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Settings AI, SSO, API token, and update loading states compose LoadingSpinner instead of local border-based spinner shells.

patternGuards.summary: Settings surfaces must not recreate border-bottom loading spinners locally; compose LoadingSpinner so size, tone, and accessibility behavior stay shared.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Settings RBAC and agent profile loading states compose LoadingSpinner instead of local border-bottom spinner shells.

patternGuards.summary: Shared primitive internals must not recreate local animate-spin loading shells; compose LoadingSpinner so pages inherit the canonical size, tone, and accessibility behavior by construction.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Button loading state, PulseDataGrid loading rows, and HistoryChart overlays compose LoadingSpinner instead of local SVG or border spinner shells.

patternGuards.summary: Resource and workload drawer discovery Suspense fallbacks must not recreate local border spinner rows; compose DiscoveryLoadingFallback so all drawer loading rows inherit the same spinner, spacing, copy, and status semantics.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Discovery tab fallbacks in drawers compose DiscoveryLoadingFallback instead of local centered border-spinner rows.

patternGuards.summary: Login and first-session auth surfaces must not recreate border-based loading spinners locally; compose LoadingSpinner so size, tone, and accessibility behavior stay shared.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Login auth checks, setup fallback, and submit-pending states compose LoadingSpinner instead of local border or SVG spinner shells.

patternGuards.summary: Platform tables must compose the shared PlatformTableShell frame instead of recreating the TableCard/TableHeader/TableBody shell locally.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Platform table frames must use PlatformTableShell; no local-frame exceptions are currently allowed.

patternGuards.summary: Platform feature tables must compose PlatformTableEmptyState for their table/card empty-state shell instead of importing EmptyState directly.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Platform table empty states must use PlatformTableEmptyState; no platform feature exceptions are currently allowed.

patternGuards.summary: Migrated settings panels must not recreate centered text/icon empty-state shells.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Embedded settings panel empty states must use EmptyState variant="panel" instead of local centered icon/text stacks.

patternGuards.summary: Availability settings must not recreate the centered action empty-state shell.
allPatterns: flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-3 px-4 py-12 text-center
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Availability settings empty states must use EmptyState variant="panel" with a Button action slot.

patternGuards.summary: Audit Log must not recreate a local dashed empty-state frame.
allPatterns: text-center py-12 px-4 bg-surface-alt rounded-md border border-dashed border-border
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Audit Log empty states must use EmptyState so framed panel spacing, icon treatment, and action slots stay shared.

patternGuards.summary: Product table surfaces must not copy the retired local bordered overflow-hidden table wrapper owned by TableCard.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Product table frames must use TableCard; local bordered overflow-hidden table wrappers are not allowed.

patternGuards.summary: Product table surfaces must not reintroduce the retired SummaryTableCardHeader local alias.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Table-card title/action/clear chrome must use TableCardHeader; no local header aliases are allowed.

patternGuards.summary: Compact drawer, discovery, resource-detail, and shared overview cards must not copy the bordered bg-surface p-3 shadow shell owned by InfoCardFrame.
allPatterns: rounded border border-border bg-surface p-3 shadow-sm
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Repeated compact information card frames must use InfoCardFrame; local card-shell copies are not allowed.

patternGuards.summary: Platform feature loading states must compose PlatformTableLoadingState instead of recreating the compact TableCard status row locally.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Platform table loading states must use PlatformTableLoadingState; no compact local status-row exceptions are currently allowed.

patternGuards.summary: Kubernetes platform tables must not recreate local textValue helpers for trimmed-string empty-cell fallback.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Kubernetes platform table text cells must use formatPlatformTableTextValue for the shared trimmed-string empty-cell marker.

patternGuards.summary: TrueNAS platform tables must not recreate local titleCase helpers for status/state label fallback.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. TrueNAS platform table status/state labels must use formatPlatformTableTitleCaseValue for the shared title-case fallback.

patternGuards.summary: Platform tables must not recreate local compactList helpers for compact value summaries.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Platform table compact list normalization must use summarizePlatformTableValues for shared trimming and normalized values.

patternGuards.summary: Platform tables must not recreate local summarizeValues helpers for compact value summaries.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Platform table compact value summaries must use summarizePlatformTableValues for shared labels, overflow counts, and title text.

patternGuards.summary: Platform tables must not recreate local one-unit formatUptime helpers for uptime label fallback.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Platform table uptime labels must use formatPlatformTableUptimeValue for the shared one-unit uptime fallback.

patternGuards.summary: Platform tables and drawers must not recreate function-based one-unit formatUptime helpers for uptime label fallback.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Platform table uptime labels must use formatPlatformTableUptimeValue for the shared one-unit uptime fallback.

patternGuards.summary: Platform tables must not recreate local formatBytes wrappers for positive byte-size empty-cell fallback.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Platform table byte-size cells must use formatPlatformTableBytesValue for shared positive-byte formatting and empty-cell markers.

patternGuards.summary: Platform feature tables must not import the generic byte formatter directly for dense table byte cells.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Dense platform table byte cells must use formatPlatformTableBytesValue so positive-byte formatting and empty markers stay shared.

patternGuards.summary: Platform table files must not call the generic formatUptime utility directly for uptime cells.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Dense platform table uptime cells must compose formatPlatformTableUptimeValue so compact/full labels and empty markers stay shared.

patternGuards.summary: Platform tables must not recreate local numberValue helpers for optional numeric table cells.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Optional numeric platform table cells must use PlatformTableNumberValue for finite-number checks, tabular styling, and empty-cell markers.

patternGuards.summary: Platform tables must not recreate local countCell helpers for locale-formatted optional numeric table cells.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Locale-formatted count cells must compose PlatformTableNumberValue with a caller-owned format function instead of owning fallback markup locally.

patternGuards.summary: Platform tables and drawers must not recreate local integer format helpers for count labels.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Dense platform integer count labels must use formatPlatformTableIntegerValue so rounding, locale formatting, and empty markers stay shared.

patternGuards.summary: Platform tables and drawers must not call toLocaleString directly for count cells.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Dense platform integer count cells must use formatPlatformTableIntegerValue and PlatformTableNumberValue instead of local count formatting.

patternGuards.summary: Platform tables must not recreate local replicaCount helpers for scheduler/service count columns.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Scheduler and service count cells must compose PlatformTableNumberValue with caller-owned zero-default semantics instead of local tabular span helpers.

patternGuards.summary: Docker Swarm table drawers must not render desired/running service counts with local tabular spans.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Swarm desired/running count cells must route through PlatformTableNumberValue so drawer tables and platform tables share numeric cell rendering.

patternGuards.summary: Platform tables must not recreate local healthy/total count-ratio helpers.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Healthy/total and ready/total table count cells must compose PlatformTableCountRatioValue so ratio markup, tabular styling, muted denominator styling, and empty markers stay shared.

patternGuards.summary: Kubernetes networking tables must not recreate ready/total endpoint count labels with local template strings.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Ready/total endpoint labels must compose formatPlatformTableCountRatioValue so zero-default, suffix, and empty-label behavior stay shared with count-ratio cells.

patternGuards.summary: TrueNAS protection tables must not recreate compact completed-time helpers for timestamp cells.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Compact platform timestamp cells must compose PlatformTableDateTimeValue so date parsing, empty markers, and tabular styling stay shared.

patternGuards.summary: vSphere activity tables must not recreate compact activity-date helpers for timestamp cells.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Compact platform timestamp cells must compose PlatformTableDateTimeValue so date parsing, empty markers, minimum-year handling, and tabular styling stay shared.

patternGuards.summary: Platform tables must not call formatRelativeTime directly for dense timestamp-age cells.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Platform table relative timestamp cells must compose PlatformTableRelativeTimeValue so compact labels, empty markers, and tabular styling stay shared.

patternGuards.summary: Platform tables must not recreate local elapsed-duration helpers for seconds/minutes duration cells.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Platform duration cells must compose PlatformTableDurationValue so elapsed-duration labels, fallback text, empty markers, and tabular styling stay shared.

patternGuards.summary: Platform tables must not recreate local interval helpers for polling interval cells.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Platform interval cells must compose PlatformTableDurationValue so seconds/minutes labels, empty markers, and tabular styling stay shared.

patternGuards.summary: Responsive platform table models must not recreate local weighted-width percentage helpers.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Responsive platform table width normalization must use getPlatformTableWeightedColumnWidthStyle so percentage rounding and zero-width fallback stay shared.

patternGuards.summary: TrueNAS table scalar value cells must not put tabular-number styling on table cells instead of shared value primitives.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. TrueNAS share/service and adjacent scalar value cells must render through shared platform value primitives so finite-number checks, tabular styling, and empty markers stay shared.

patternGuards.summary: Platform tables must not recreate local formatPercent helpers for one-decimal percent cells.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. One-decimal percent cells must compose PlatformTablePercentValue so percent formatting, tabular styling, and empty markers stay shared.

patternGuards.summary: Proxmox platform tables and drawers must not recreate one-decimal percent labels with toFixed.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Proxmox platform percent labels must compose formatPlatformTablePercentValue or PlatformTablePercentValue so formatting stays shared.

patternGuards.summary: Proxmox platform tables must not recreate local percent label helpers for metric cells.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Proxmox platform percent metric labels must compose formatPlatformTablePercentValue so ratio normalization, clamping, and empty markers stay shared.

patternGuards.summary: Platform tables must not recreate local formatTemperature helpers for positive Celsius cells.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Positive Celsius table cells must compose PlatformTableTemperatureValue so validity, formatting, tabular styling, and empty markers stay shared.

patternGuards.summary: Platform tables must not recreate local temperatureLabel helpers for positive Celsius cells.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Positive Celsius table cells must compose PlatformTableTemperatureValue so validity, formatting, tabular styling, and empty markers stay shared.

patternGuards.summary: Platform tables must not recreate local finiteMetric and metricFallback helpers for metric cells.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Platform table metric cells must use PlatformTableMetricFallback and getPlatformTableFiniteMetric instead of carrying page-local metric fallback helpers.

patternGuards.summary: Platform metric cells must not recreate centered muted dash fallback markup inline.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Platform metric cells must compose PlatformTableMetricFallback instead of carrying inline centered dash fallback markup.

patternGuards.summary: Platform table models must not recreate local finiteMetric helpers for metric normalization.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Platform table model-side metric normalization must use getPlatformTableFiniteMetric so table presentation validity remains shared.

patternGuards.summary: Platform page surfaces must not recreate the active-link tab navigation owned by PlatformSectionTabs.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Platform page section tabs must use PlatformSectionTabs; no page-local tab-bar exceptions are currently allowed.

patternGuards.summary: Summary-bearing surfaces must not copy the Show charts / Hide charts display-toggle labels owned by ChartVisibilityToggleButton.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Chart visibility display actions must use ChartVisibilityToggleButton; local show/hide chart toggle copies are not allowed.

patternGuards.summary: Table surfaces must not copy the column chooser title and panel copy owned by ColumnPicker.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Table column visibility controls must use ColumnPicker; local column chooser copies are not allowed.

patternGuards.summary: Settings and feature surfaces must not copy the compact/detail active-card styling owned by SelectionCardGroup.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Selectable settings card groups must use SelectionCardGroup; local compact/detail active-card styling forks are not allowed.

patternGuards.summary: Resource surfaces must not copy the grouped/list table-mode segmented-control labels owned by GroupedTableModeSegmentedControl.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Grouped/list table-mode controls must use GroupedTableModeSegmentedControl; no local label/title copies are currently allowed.

patternGuards.summary: Page and feature filter surfaces must not import the legacy PageControls deck when they should be expressed as a FilterBar catalog.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Resource-list filter surfaces must compose FilterBar; no page-level filter exceptions are currently allowed.

patternGuards.summary: Product surfaces must not render native type=search inputs; they must compose SearchField or SearchInput so search chrome, clear behavior, keyboard handling, and aria labels stay canonical.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Search controls must use SearchField or SearchInput; native search inputs are not allowed in product surfaces.

patternGuards.summary: Storage linked-disk health rows must not recreate the retired green/yellow raw dot classes owned by StatusDot.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Linked-disk health indicators must use StatusDot variants instead of local green/yellow dot classes.

patternGuards.summary: Product components must compose StatusIndicatorBadge instead of calling getStatusIndicatorBadgeToneClasses directly for read-only health/state badges.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Read-only status badges must route through StatusIndicatorBadge; status utilities may still expose tone classes for the shared primitive and non-component tests.

patternGuards.summary: Platform alert tables must not recreate severityVariant/severityTextClass helpers; alert severity tone and label presentation belongs to AlertSeverityBadge and alertSeverityPresentation.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Platform alert rows must compose AlertSeverityBadge and AlertSeverityDot instead of page-local severity tone helpers.

patternGuards.summary: Platform alert tables must not recreate alertTone severity detail-row helpers; detail tone mapping belongs to alertSeverityPresentation.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Platform alert detail rows must call getAlertSeverityDetailTone instead of carrying page-local severity tone helpers.

patternGuards.summary: Platform alert tables must not recreate provider-code formatter helpers; alert code labels belong to alertDetailPresentation.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Platform alert code labels must call formatPlatformAlertCode instead of carrying page-local prefix stripping and title casing.

patternGuards.summary: Platform alert tables must not recreate resource-type formatter helpers; provider-specific resource labels belong to alertDetailPresentation.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Platform alert resource-type labels must call formatPlatformAlertResourceType instead of carrying page-local switch maps.

patternGuards.summary: Platform alert tables must not recreate started-at timestamp formatter helpers; alert timestamp labels belong to alertDetailPresentation.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Platform alert row timestamps must call formatPlatformAlertStartedAt instead of carrying page-local date formatting.

patternGuards.summary: Platform alert tables must not recreate detail timestamp formatter helpers; alert detail date labels belong to alertDetailPresentation.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Platform alert detail timestamps must call formatPlatformAlertDetailDateTime instead of carrying page-local date formatting.

patternGuards.summary: vSphere alert tables must not recreate entity-type formatter helpers; vSphere alert entity labels belong to alertDetailPresentation.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. vSphere alert entity labels must call formatPlatformAlertEntityType instead of carrying page-local normalization.

patternGuards.summary: Patrol finding-row metadata chips must compose MetadataBadge instead of recreating local bordered xs badge spans.
allPatterns: px-1.5 py-0.5 border text-[10px] font-medium rounded
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Patrol finding row state, source, severity, investigation, confidence, and regression chips use MetadataBadge for shared shell, sizing, tone, and outline behavior.

patternGuards.summary: Patrol investigation metadata chips must compose MetadataBadge instead of recreating local bordered xs status, outcome, record, or tool badges.
allPatterns: px-1.5 py-0.5 border text-[10px] font-medium rounded
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Patrol investigation status, outcome, durable-record, and tool chips use MetadataBadge for shared shell, sizing, tone, and outline behavior.

patternGuards.summary: Patrol approval and tool-call metadata chips must compose MetadataBadge instead of recreating local xs risk, expiry, or result badges.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Patrol approval risk, approval state, and tool-call result chips use MetadataBadge for shared shell, sizing, tone, and whitespace behavior.

patternGuards.summary: Patrol run-history metadata chips must compose MetadataBadge instead of recreating local rounded resource or outcome pill spans.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Patrol run-history resource and outcome chips use MetadataBadge for shared shell, sizing, tone, and whitespace behavior.

patternGuards.summary: Proxmox backup source and state metadata chips must compose MetadataBadge instead of recreating local rounded-sm xs badge spans.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Proxmox backup source/state chips use MetadataBadge for shared shell, sizing, tone vocabulary, and whitespace behavior.

patternGuards.summary: Organization settings sections must not call roleBadgeClass directly; compose OrganizationRoleBadge so role tone mapping and badge shell stay canonical.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Organization role badges belong to OrganizationRoleBadge and MetadataBadge.

patternGuards.summary: Organization share tables must not recreate local statusBadgeClass helpers; compose OrganizationShareStatusBadge for canonical pending/active labels and tones.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Organization share status badges belong to OrganizationShareStatusBadge and MetadataBadge.

patternGuards.summary: Product and shared filter components must compose FormSelect instead of recreating labelled native select shells locally.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Native select controls must use FormSelect for label/id/select chrome wiring and dynamic option value synchronization.

patternGuards.summary: Alert textareas must compose FormTextarea so labels, help text, controlled values, and multiline field styling stay canonical.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Alert multiline fields belong to FormTextarea so row, mobile, destination, and timeline editors use the same labelled primitive.

patternGuards.summary: Settings textareas must compose FormTextarea so labels, help text, controlled values, and multiline field styling stay canonical.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Settings multiline fields belong to FormTextarea, including provider metadata and access mapping editors.

patternGuards.summary: Infrastructure modal textareas must compose FormTextarea instead of recreating labelled native textarea wrappers locally.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Infrastructure form textareas must use FormTextarea for label/id/help wiring.

patternGuards.summary: Binary switch-looking controls must compose Toggle or TogglePrimitive instead of hand-rolling local role=switch buttons with aria-checked and custom track/knob classes.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Local switch role buttons must route through the shared Toggle primitive; radios, checkboxes, and selection controls are governed separately.

patternGuards.summary: Filter option status-dot leading icons must use the FilterBar presentation helper instead of page-local span factories.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Filter chip leading-dot presentation is owned by the FilterBar primitive family.

patternGuards.summary: Settings and feature surfaces must not copy the compact active-button segmented-control styling owned by FilterButtonGroup.
allPatterns: flex items-center bg-base rounded-md p-1 border shadow-inner
flex-1 py-1.5 px-2 text-xs font-semibold rounded-md transition-all duration-200
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Settings and compact feature segmented selectors must use FilterButtonGroup; local active-button selector styling forks are not allowed.

patternGuards.summary: Feature table view toggles must compose FilterButtonGroup instead of copying the compact bordered group and active view-button styling locally.
allPatterns: inline-flex items-center gap-1 rounded-md border border-border bg-surface p-1
inline-flex min-h-8 items-center gap-1.5 rounded-sm px-3 text-xs font-medium transition-colors
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Feature table view toggles must use FilterButtonGroup; local bordered segmented-view selector forks are not allowed.

patternGuards.summary: Settings and feature surfaces must not copy the rounded active/inactive selector pill styling owned by SelectablePillButton.
allPatterns: rounded-full border px-3 py-2 text-sm font-semibold transition
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Pressed/unpressed pill selectors belong to SelectablePillButton.

patternGuards.summary: Product surfaces must not copy the standard secondary command-button shell; use Button for buttons and ButtonLink for route/link actions.
allPatterns: rounded-md border border-border bg-surface px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium text-base-content
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Standard secondary command buttons belong to the shared Button primitive family, including button-styled links.

patternGuards.summary: Command-copy controls must not recreate the absolute top-right icon-button shell; use CommandCopyButton from the shared Button primitive family.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Command-copy icon buttons belong to CommandCopyButton so position, sizing, icon, focus, disabled, and aria behavior stay canonical.

patternGuards.summary: Drawer header command actions must compose DrawerHeaderActionButton for shared height, density, focus, disabled, and hover styling instead of copying drawer-local button classes.
allPatterns: inline-flex h-8 items-center gap-1.5 rounded border border-border bg-surface px-2 text-xs font-medium text-base-content transition-colors hover:bg-surface-hover focus:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-blue-500
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Drawer header Assistant and context-copy actions belong to the shared Button primitive family.

patternGuards.summary: Drawer header icon actions must compose DrawerHeaderIconButton for shared close/action chrome instead of copying drawer-local icon button classes.
allPatterns: inline-flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-md hover:bg-surface-hover hover:text-base-content focus:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-blue-500
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Drawer header close and icon actions belong to the shared Button primitive family.

patternGuards.summary: Product surfaces must not use a class helper to make upgrade CTAs look like buttons; compose UpgradeButtonLink instead.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Upgrade action button shape, routing, and link safety belong to UpgradeButtonLink.

patternGuards.summary: Product surfaces must not style UpgradeLink as a local button; use UpgradeButtonLink for button-styled upgrade actions and reserve UpgradeLink for inline text links.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Button-styled upgrade actions must use UpgradeButtonLink; inline copy links may continue using UpgradeLink.

patternGuards.summary: Copy-value controls must not copy the neutral bordered icon-button shell; use CopyValueButton with the neutral variant.
allPatterns: inline-flex min-h-7 min-w-7 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded border border-border bg-surface px-2 text-muted transition-colors hover:bg-surface-hover hover:text-base-content
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Neutral copy-value icon buttons belong to CopyValueButton.

patternGuards.summary: Copy-value controls must not copy the muted icon-button shell; use CopyValueButton with the ghost variant.
allPatterns: inline-flex min-h-8 min-w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-md text-muted transition-colors hover:bg-surface-hover hover:text-base-content
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Muted copy-value icon buttons belong to CopyValueButton.

patternGuards.summary: Copy-value controls must not copy the blue suggested-value icon-button shell; use CopyValueButton with the accent variant.
allPatterns: inline-flex min-h-7 min-w-7 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded text-blue-700 transition-colors hover:bg-blue-100 dark:text-blue-200 dark:hover:bg-blue-950
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Accent copy-value icon buttons belong to CopyValueButton.

patternGuards.summary: Copyable code/value rows must not copy the local surface-alt font-mono row shell; use CopyableCodeRow.
allPatterns: flex items-start gap-2 rounded bg-surface-alt px-2 py-1.5
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Copyable code rows belong to CopyableCodeRow so code styling and copy behavior stay canonical.

patternGuards.summary: Inline platform detail content must not recreate local DetailField grids; use DetailSectionTable or InlineDetailPanel.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Inline detail field grids belong to DetailSectionTable / InlineDetailPanel so detail sections, value tones, truncation, and close actions stay canonical.

patternGuards.summary: Platform-neutral detail section tables must not import the retired provider-named TrueNAS detail primitive.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Provider-specific names must not own platform-neutral detail tables; use DetailSectionTable / detailSectionModel.

patternGuards.summary: Provider resource detail drawer models must not define provider-local row and section primitives.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Provider detail drawers own fields and labels, while row and section shape belongs to DetailSection / DetailRow in detailSectionModel.

patternGuards.summary: The resource detail drawer must not render VMware detail sections with a local vSphere card/table shell.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. VMware detail rows share the same DetailSectionTable renderer and tone classes as other provider detail drawers.

patternGuards.summary: Resource detail drawer models must not recreate local byte-scaling helpers.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Detail drawer byte labels must use formatDetailBytesValue so byte precision, zero handling, and unit scaling stay shared.

patternGuards.summary: Resource detail drawer models must not recreate compact local capacity byte helpers.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Compact detail drawer capacity labels must use formatDetailBytesValue with compact precision instead of local byte scaling.

patternGuards.summary: Resource detail drawer models must not recreate local count pluralization helpers.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Detail drawer count labels must use formatDetailCountValue so integer formatting and pluralization stay shared.

patternGuards.summary: Resource detail drawer models must not recreate local integer formatters.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Detail drawer integer labels must use formatDetailIntegerValue so count-like numeric rows share locale formatting.

patternGuards.summary: Settings and hosted-admin surfaces must not copy compact xs action-button shells; use Button with the settingsActionXs or sm size.
allPatterns: rounded-md border border-border bg-surface px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-base-content
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Compact settings and admin actions belong to the shared Button primitive family.

allPatterns: rounded-md border border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 px-3 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-blue-700

patternGuards.summary: Settings and infrastructure surfaces must not copy red ghost row-action shells; use Button with the dangerGhost variant and xs size.

patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Destructive row actions belong to the shared Button primitive family.

allPatterns: h-9 w-9 items-center justify-center rounded-md border border-border text-base-content transition-colors hover:bg-surface-hover
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Settings dialog close buttons belong to the shared Button primitive family.

patternGuards.summary: Billing admin organization Suspend and Activate row actions must not recreate the compact hosted-billing button shell; use Button with the secondary variant and sm size.
allPatterns: px-2.5 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-md border border-border bg-surface hover:bg-surface-hover disabled:opacity-50

patternGuards.summary: Billing admin organization expanded-row Reload actions must not recreate the compact hosted-billing button shell; use Button with the secondary variant and xs size.

patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. Hosted billing expanded-row reload actions belong to the shared Button primitive family.

patternGuards.summary: SSO provider primary add/save actions must not recreate local blue settings button shells; use Button with the primary variant and settingsAction or md size.
allPatterns: min-h-10 sm:min-h-9 px-3 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-md
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. SSO provider primary actions belong to the shared Button primitive family.

patternGuards.summary: SSO provider secondary add/test/preview actions must not recreate local bordered or surface-hover settings button shells; use Button with the outline or secondary variant.
allPatterns: text-sm font-medium border border-border text-base-content rounded-md
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. SSO provider secondary actions belong to the shared Button primitive family.

patternGuards.summary: SSO provider inline Test and Preview form actions must not recreate local surface-hover button shells; use Button with the secondary variant and mdCompact size.
allPatterns: px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium bg-surface-hover text-base-content rounded-md
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. SSO provider inline form actions belong to the shared Button primitive family.

patternGuards.summary: SSO provider edit, delete, and close icon actions must not recreate local icon-button shells; use ActionIconButton.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. SSO provider icon actions belong to ActionIconButton.

patternGuards.summary: SSO provider metadata copy controls must not recreate local link-like copy buttons; use CopyValueButton.
patternGuards.legacyReason: Retired migration debt. SSO provider metadata copy actions belong to CopyValueButton.

requiredPatternGuards.summary: Settings LoadingState components must compose SettingsLoadingSkeleton, so new settings panels cannot introduce local loading skeleton templates.
Platform rows using shared resource-detail expansion state must render the canonical disclosure toggle instead of relying on row-only click behavior or local chevrons.
Feature alert tables with severityBucket-driven platform rows must compose AlertSeverityBadge and AlertSeverityDot so new platform alert tables cannot invent local severity indicators.
Feature alert tables with severityBucket-backed PlatformTableToolbar status filters must compose the shared platform alert severity filter-options primitive.
Feature alert tables with incident-row detail code and started-at fields must compose the shared platform alert detail formatter primitive.
Platform tables that render page-local inline detail rows must compose the canonical disclosure toggle in the owning row.
Files that render inline/detail table rows in platform, workload, or infrastructure surfaces must use InlineDetailTableRow for the shared row/cell/content shell.
Platform feature files that surface load-failure copy must compose PlatformErrorState for the canonical retry shell.
Named platform detail rows such as Docker network detail rows must use InlineDetailTableRow even when their row attribute is not data-inline-*.
